name: The Business Value in IT Outsourcing
description: Frictionless Data Package for Aberdeen Group research brief (June 2006) by Peter S. Kastner hypothesizing that IT outsourcing engagements fall into three maturity tiers: approximately 30% seriously misaligned, 50-66% sub-optimal, and only 5-10% driving full anticipated business value. The brief identifies five major outsourcing drivers and nine challenge areas, drawing on surveys of 2,000+ companies on IT maturity.

variableMeasured.name: outsourcing_maturity_tier
variableMeasured.description: Classification of IT outsourcing engagements into misaligned, sub-optimal, or optimal tiers

variableMeasured.name: roi_measurement_frequency
variableMeasured.description: Frequency of measuring ROI after software application upgrades or changes as IT maturity indicator

variableMeasured.name: survey_base_size
variableMeasured.description: Number of companies surveyed on IT organizational maturity

distribution.name: Structured observations extracted from the study
Code definitions for observation types, confidence levels, and methodologies
